title: Apply chemicals under supervision
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply chemicals under supervision demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to handle chemicals

pcs.text: Confirm the activity related to chemical handling to be undertaken with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the activity related to chemical handling to be undertaken with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the activity related to chemical handling to be undertaken with supervisor.

pcs.text: Identify and select tools and equipment required according to supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select tools and equipment required according to supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select tools and equipment required according to supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Identify health and safety hazards and risks and apply controls according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify health and safety hazards and risks and apply controls according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify health and safety hazards and risks and apply controls according to supervisor instructions and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE)
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE)?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment (PPE).

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to handle chemicals

elements.title: Check application equipment

pcs.text: Carry out pre-operational checks of application equipment and identify and replace any damaged or worn components or report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out pre-operational checks of application equipment and identify and replace any damaged or worn components or report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out pre-operational checks of application equipment and identify and replace any damaged or worn components or report to supervisor.

pcs.text: Prepare application equipment for use according to workplace practice and safe chemical handling processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare application equipment for use according to workplace practice and safe chemical handling processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare application equipment for use according to workplace practice and safe chemical handling processes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Check application equipment

elements.title: Handle and transport chemicals

pcs.text: Confirm safety precautions for the handling and transport of chemicals with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm safety precautions for the handling and transport of chemicals with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm safety precautions for the handling and transport of chemicals with supervisor.

pcs.text: Handle and transport chemicals according to chemical label, safety data sheets and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle and transport chemicals according to chemical label, safety data sheets and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle and transport chemicals according to chemical label, safety data sheets and supervisor instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Handle and transport chemicals

elements.title: Prepare chemical for application

pcs.text: Interpret and apply chemical label instructions according to safety data sheets for the chemical or substance being used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret and apply chemical label instructions according to safety data sheets for the chemical or substance being used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret and apply chemical label instructions according to safety data sheets for the chemical or substance being used.

pcs.text: Select and use appropriate mixing equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select and use appropriate mixing equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select and use appropriate mixing equipment.

pcs.text: Measure, mix and load application equipment with chemical according to application rates
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure, mix and load application equipment with chemical according to application rates?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure, mix and load application equipment with chemical according to application rates.

pcs.text: Clear chemical spills according to chemical label and  supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clear chemical spills according to chemical label and  supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear chemical spills according to chemical label and  supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Check that output of application equipment is correct and in accordance with chemical application plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that output of application equipment is correct and in accordance with chemical application plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that output of application equipment is correct and in accordance with chemical application plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Prepare chemical for application

elements.title: Apply chemicals

pcs.text: Assess and record weather conditions and forecasts prior to and during application according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess and record weather conditions and forecasts prior to and during application according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess and record weather conditions and forecasts prior to and during application according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Apply chemical safely according to chemical application plan, chemical label and supervisor instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply chemical safely according to chemical application plan, chemical label and supervisor instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply chemical safely according to chemical application plan, chemical label and supervisor instructions.

pcs.text: Monitor conditions for application and take appropriate action when conditions are unsuitable according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor conditions for application and take appropriate action when conditions are unsuitable according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor conditions for application and take appropriate action when conditions are unsuitable according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Minimise risks to others, product integrity and the environment prior to and during application
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise risks to others, product integrity and the environment prior to and during application?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise risks to others, product integrity and the environment prior to and during application.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Apply chemicals

elements.title: Finalise work

pcs.text: Clean and store PPE and application equipment in accordance with manufacturers and health and safety in the workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and store PPE and application equipment in accordance with manufacturers and health and safety in the workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and store PPE and application equipment in accordance with manufacturers and health and safety in the workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Dispose of excess chemicals and clean containers in accordance with label instructions and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dispose of excess chemicals and clean containers in accordance with label instructions and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dispose of excess chemicals and clean containers in accordance with label instructions and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Complete incident reports according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete incident reports according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete incident reports according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Complete chemical application records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete chemical application records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete chemical application records according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Store unused chemical and products according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Store unused chemical and products according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Store unused chemical and products according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Adhere to all re-entry requirements for treated areas
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adhere to all re-entry requirements for treated areas?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adhere to all re-entry requirements for treated areas.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Finalise work
